ids=None
and then add code that says
if ids == None:

sig is local to the loop. Assuming that the signal handler gets invoked after this function ends, sig is going to be looked up when the lambda is invoked. At that point, it will have the last value it had in the for-loop, getattr(signal, "SIGTERM").
please add a module docstring here
aiohttp, re and shutil are unused
a class docstring should be added
by the way, this is a very nice function. I might reuse this pattern for some other code. :)

um, why not a set comprehension instead of a list comprehension that is then turned into a set?

tmp = { x.get("policyName") for x in policy_bodies if "policyName" in x }

Note: the equivalent python 2 code would have been
tmp = set(x.get("policyName") for x in policy_bodies if "policyName" in x)
because of the return right above, there's no need for an else here for the remaining code

please move the comment into a file docstring

(make it a multi-line string before the imports)
The requirement is for py38 to be listed at a minimum. Others (py36, py37) are optional.
